## Summary

Adds a guided defensive Revise Queue page at `/workbench-v2` while leaving `/workbench` unchanged as the reference path.

## Scope

- In scope: presentation and action-gating UX behavior for `/workbench-v2`.
- Out of scope: pipeline architecture changes, ingestion/admission behavior changes, and product-scope expansion.
- Follow-up architecture work remains tracked in #819.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0
Head-SHA: 0558593dc08b8bccdd11b77d17abaaa9bd280ad1

## Visual Evidence

- Vercel preview is available for `/workbench-v2`.
- Existing `/workbench` remains unchanged as reference.

## Accessibility

- No intentional keyboard trap introduced.
- Existing semantic structure retained for primary controls.

## Browser Targets

- Chromium-based browsers
- Firefox
- Safari

## Risks & Anomalies

- This PR intentionally limits itself to defensive UI behavior.
- Any architecture-level reduction of unsupported duplicate findings is deferred to #819.

## Unauthorized Input Sources

- None added.
- UI reads persisted queue payload and ledger APIs only.

## Internal Process Leakage

- No internal-only workflow/process details are surfaced in user-visible UI copy.

## Input → Action → Output

- Input: persisted queue findings and user decisions.
- Action: user accepts/rejects/defers with evidence-gated controls.
- Output: decision ledger state persisted/synced through existing revision-ledger API.

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

- Visible status limited to user-safe decision/sync states.
- No internal pipeline diagnostics exposed to end users.

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

- No new runtime jobs introduced.
- No new background pipeline stages added.
- No existing pipeline stage behavior altered.

## Latency Impact

No-Pipeline-Impact: true
- UI-only change; no new server pipeline path introduced by this PR.
